originalTitle: PufferLib - world models get another chance
title: Debugging World Model Instability in PufferLib Dreamer Implementation
summary: Worked on integrating a Dreamer v3-style world model into PufferLib, debugging persistent stability issues on CartPole. Adjusted replay buffer, loss clipping, and gradient detachment, achieving learning but with cyclic instability; minimal progress on Breakout and Pong.
